case_title: BANK ONE, COLUMBUS NA vs. CAMACHO, ROGELIO et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK ONE, COLUMBUS NA AS TO DEFENDANT CAMACHO, ROGELIO DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-30-1995 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-28-1995 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-10-1995

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-30-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAY-30-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JUN-29-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-15-1995 Sweep; Adjudicated

STATUS CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-30-1995 Continued To Jun-29-95 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 04
